title: Logistics are insane - From China to my doorstep for 2$
description: While cheacking the tracking status of my package, I went into the deep rabbithole of international logistics. I still can't wrap my head arond the scale of it.

title: Timeline of my art - Time to take it seriously
description: I've always had a thing for drawing, I'd always draw little doodles on my school notes for example, and people seemed to like them. From that time onwards, I've been working on improving my art.

title: Social media fantasy of wealth
description: I’m writing this for someone, someone I love. I don’t think he’s reading this, as he’s busy with the "hustle", but I’m hopeful he’ll come back.
